title: Mr James Watchorn (Date of Birth 17 August 1976) of Le Douit, Saints Bay Road, St Martin, Guernsey, GY4 6ES
text:
## News


# Mr James Watchorn (Date of Birth 17 August 1976) of Le Douit, Saints Bay Road, St Martin, Guernsey, GY4 6ES

- Prohibitions
Date of prohibition order pursuant to Section 33 of The Financial Services Business (Enforcement Powers) (Bailiwick of Guernsey) Law, 2020 and prohibited functions:
From 9 March 2026 to 9 August 2027: holding the position of money laundering reporting officer and money laundering compliance officer.
